intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets in Clifton, New Jersey? Best Pest Control NYC provides professional hornet removal services to protect your family and property from these dangerous stinging insects. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from residential and commercial properties throughout Clifton, ensuring complete removal and prevention of future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Clifton and the greater NYC metro area for years with fast, reliable hornet removal services. Our licensed technicians use proven methods and professional-grade equipment to safely remove hornet nests while minimizing risk to you, your family, and your pets.
localContext: Clifton's tree-lined neighborhoods, historic Main Avenue commercial district, and proximity to the Passaic River create ideal nesting conditions for hornets in eaves, attics, and outdoor structures. From the bustling businesses near Clifton Commons to the quiet residential streets near Weasel Brook Park, we've helped countless Clifton property owners reclaim their outdoor spaces from these aggressive pests.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Clifton?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for hornet removal in Clifton, NJ. Hornet infestations require immediate attention due to safety concerns, and our team prioritizes emergency calls to protect your family and property as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe nest elimination using professional equipment, removal of the nest structure, treatment of the area to prevent re-infestation, and a follow-up inspection if needed. Pricing varies based on nest size, location, and accessibility.

faqs.question: Are hornets dangerous compared to other stinging insects?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets are more aggressive than many other stinging insects and can sting multiple times. They defend their nests vigorously and can attack in swarms when threatened. Hornet stings are also more painful and can cause severe allergic reactions in sensitive individuals, making professional removal essential.

faqs.question: When is hornet season in Clifton, NJ?
faqs.answer: Hornet activity in Clifton typically peaks from late spring through early fall, with nests growing largest in August and September. However, we provide hornet removal services year-round, as nests can remain active during warm weather and pose risks even in cooler months.
